compiled_from: Single Claude (Anthropic) conversation, AQARION/KSD/FOQDS research program
verification_environment: Fresh container per claim; pure Python (numpy/scipy/sympy), no network access

claims.title: Kaprekar Closed Form
claims.notes: Verified over all 10,000 inputs, 0 exceptions. Foundation for all downstream results.

claims.title: Gap Projection Congruence
claims.statement: Gap projection π is a transition congruence (π∘K = T_G∘π)
claims.notes: Proven in Theorem 2 of flagship_theorem.tex, not just observed

claims.title: Gap Lattice Cardinality
claims.notes: Proven via exact domain characterization in Proposition 3

claims.title: Affine Chamber Atlas
claims.statement: 18 canonical affine chamber regions (not 21 — several 'chambers' share identical affine law)
claims.corrected_statement: 21 labeled regions contain 18 canonical affine laws
claims.notes: Corrected from earlier 21-chamber overcount. Verified exhaustively.

claims.title: Monoid Order
claims.notes: Exhaustive verification, 0 exceptions

claims.title: Rigidity (Automorphism Triviality)
claims.notes: Exhaustive + structural proof. No non-trivial automorphisms exist.

claims.title: Image Filtration
claims.notes: Exhaustive verification. Stabilization sequence confirmed.

claims.title: Full System Reachability
claims.statement: |X|=8992 reachable 4-digit states (convention: exclude leading-zero inputs and 9 nonzero repdigits)
claims.notes: Convention made explicit. Verified against exhaustive enumeration.

claims.title: Attractor and Depth
claims.statement: Unique attractor 6174, max transient depth 7, exactly 1980 states at depth 7
claims.notes: Exact counts verified. Attractor uniqueness proven.

claims.title: Semiconjugacy Verification
claims.notes: Perfect match across all 8992 states. No exceptions.

claims.title: Full-System Koopman Nilpotency (CORRECTED)
claims.statement: Nilpotency index of full-system Koopman operator
claims.notes: Off-by-one error in original. Corrected via rank-collapse analysis.

claims.title: Quotient Koopman Nilpotency (CORRECTED)
claims.statement: Nilpotency index of quotient Koopman operator
claims.notes: Second off-by-one correction. Consistent with lemma 4.6.

claims.title: Nilpotency Index Lemma (General)
claims.statement: For single-fixed-point system: ν(N) = max_depth exactly (not max_depth+1)
claims.notes: Proven two independent ways: rank-collapse + direct vector test

claims.title: Thread Unification
claims.statement: KSD (g1,g2)-lattice and FNDS raw-digit-projection system are the SAME quotient
claims.notes: Identical states AND identical transition map. Not coincidental—proven.

claims.title: Refinement Operator Monotonicity
claims.statement: Refinement operator Φ_O is monotone on Eq(X) for any finite (X,T,O)
claims.notes: Fully general, independent of Kaprekar. Lemma 1 in FOQDS theorem.

claims.title: Greatest Fixed Point Existence
claims.notes: Standard lattice-theoretic result. Proposition 1 in FOQDS theorem.

claims.title: Trace Equivalence Fixed Point
claims.notes: Proven both directions. Theorem 1 in FOQDS theorem. Core result.

claims.title: Concrete FOQDS Verification
claims.statement: Concrete verification on 54-state quotient with genuinely coarsening observation
claims.notes: Exact match: 82/82 related pairs. Kaprekar-specific instantiation.

claims.title: Proof Correction: Kleene vs Time Index
claims.statement: Earlier proof draft conflated two distinct inductions
claims.notes: Separated Kleene-step index from time index. Remark after Theorem 1.

claims.title: Descent Characterization (Theorem 3)
claims.notes: 722,247,211 pairs at n=7, 0 disagreements. Exhaustive proof.

claims.title: Greatest Exact Quotient (Theorem 4 - CORRECTED)
claims.statement: greatest exact quotient via set-intersection over all exact quotients
claims.corrected_statement: use coarsest element (largest relation), not intersection
claims.notes: All-singletons partition is vacuously exact, forcing intersection to diagonal.

claims.title: Greatest Exact Quotient (Theorem 4 - CORRECTED VERSION)
claims.statement: use coarsest element (largest relation), not intersection
claims.notes: Verified against directly-computed trace equivalence. Holds exactly.

claims.title: Descent vs Behavioral Minimality (Theorem 5 - CORRECTED)
claims.corrected_statement: First equivalence exact (0/166484 mismatches); [P_q,K]=0 is strictly stronger (35100/166484 mismatches)
claims.notes: [P_q,K]=0 characterizes reducing subspaces, not descent.

claims.title: Reducing Subspace Characterization
claims.statement: [P_q,K]=0 is the reducing-subspace condition—strictly stronger than descent
claims.notes: Confirmed with minimal counterexample. Architectural correction.

claims.title: Naturality Under Relabeling
claims.notes: ~19.6M tests, n≤5, 0 violations. Functoriality confirmed.

claims.title: Final Coalgebra (Theorem 6)
claims.notes: Inherits Theorem 4's exact defect if stated via intersection rather than coarsest-element

claims.title: Kaprekar Map Bug (FIXED)
claims.statement: kaprekar_map() place-value reconstruction in v8.0 experimental suite
claims.bug: Inverted place-value index negated K(n) for 9990/10000 inputs
claims.notes: Severe bug. 9990/10000 inputs affected. Now fixed.

claims.title: Missing spectrum() Method (FIXED)
claims.statement: FDDS.spectrum() method called but never defined
claims.notes: Method added to fixed version.

claims.title: Cross-Base Formula Verification
claims.notes: Source comment called this 'WRONG'; it was tested against wrong variable. Actually proven in general.

claims.title: Jordan-Depth Test (CATEGORY ERROR)
claims.bug: Compares transient depth to depth+cycle-length (category error)
claims.notes: Not a bug in system under test—a category error in test itself.

claims.title: SHyPar Convergence Test (INCOHERENT)
claims.bug: Checks if destructive partition-merging converges back to destroyed partition
claims.notes: Logically incoherent as designed.

claims.title: Defect Composition Law (FALSE)
claims.corrected_statement: False as stated; one genuine counterexample in 30 trials
claims.notes: Counterexample documented. Law does not hold universally.

claims.title: Partition-to-Matrix Bug (FIXED)
claims.bug: Correct normalized projector built then immediately overwritten by unnormalized non-idempotent matrix
claims.notes: Dead code shadowing live code. Severe bug. Cross-checked against 166,484-case ground truth.

claims.title: Backward-Lift Operator (NOT STOCHASTIC - OPEN)
claims.statement: Backward-lift operator L for spectral-gap-vs-depth correlation
claims.bug: Not stochastic; 684/715 columns entirely zero for d=4 case
claims.notes: Needs redesign, not a patch. Divides by in-degree of wrong endpoint. OPEN PROBLEM.

claims.title: 55 vs 54 State Gap (RESOLVED)
claims.statement: Fiber-elimination theorem needed to explain 55 vs 54 state count
claims.corrected_statement: K(n)=0 iff n is repdigit, one-line corollary of proven identity
claims.notes: Proposed fiber-elimination theorem was unnecessary. Problem already solved.

claims.title: 715 as Competing Quotient (CATEGORY ERROR)
claims.statement: 715 is true behavioral quotient competing with 54-state result
claims.corrected_statement: 715 = C(13,4), static combinatorics never refined by dynamics
claims.notes: Zero refinement steps occur. 715 is not a quotient, it's a combinatorial count.

claims.title: Projection-Dynamics Non-Commutativity (NOT REAL)
claims.statement: Projection–Dynamics Non-Commutativity proposed as new theorem
claims.corrected_statement: Ordinary pigeonhole arithmetic for subset projection
claims.notes: Confirmed via random-subset control. Not a dynamical discovery.

claims.title: Witness Diagnosis (RESOLVED)
claims.statement: D_Π=0 implies Π=Π_B (behavioral partition), restricted to reachable sub-lattice
claims.corrected_statement: D_Π certifies quotient-existence, not behavioral minimality; these require different operators
claims.notes: Survivor real and informative. Architectural correction, not bug fix.

claims.title: ZERO SORRY Claim (UNSUPPORTABLE)
claims.statement: ZERO SORRY achieved in Lean 4 formalization
claims.corrected_statement: Achieved via regex substitution to 'admitted' (Coq syntax, not Lean 4); no compilation occurred
claims.notes: ENVIRONMENT LIMITATION: No Lean toolchain available. Claim cannot be verified.

claims.title: projection_symmetric Theorem (PARTIAL)
claims.notes: Mathematical argument sound; Lean elaboration incomplete. OPEN: needs toolchain.

claims.title: Referee Grade (UNSUPPORTABLE)
claims.corrected_statement: That run logged all 14 modules as not found before reporting passing grade
claims.notes: Hardcoded pass despite module-not-found errors. Invalid.

claims.title: Submission Gate (HARDCODED)
claims.corrected_statement: Hardcoded, not derived from computed result
claims.notes: gate_data['all_pass'] = True set by direct assignment. Not evidence-based.

claims.title: 55-State Jordan/Nullity Numbers (VERIFIED)
claims.notes: Confirmed exactly on independent from-scratch rebuild.

claims.title: 705-Node Chamber Graph
claims.notes: 715 − 10 (sorted-digit-tuple system minus repdigits). Verified genuinely closed.

claims.title: SCC Decomposition
claims.statement: SCC decomposition: 1 nontrivial cycle, 704 transient singletons
claims.notes: Executed exactly. 1 cycle = fixed point at 6174 multiset.

claims.title: Absorption Depth Distribution
claims.notes: Computed exactly. Matches expected distribution.

claims.title: Core Size (CORRECTED)
claims.corrected_statement: actual core size is 1 (fixed point at 6174 multiset)
claims.notes: Two alternate readings checked (in-degree=38, preimage count=37); neither is 4.

claims.title: Maximum Depth
claims.notes: Confirmed exactly. Max depth = 7.

claims.title: Result Hash
claims.notes: Produced and independently reproduced from fresh container. Deterministic.

summary.note: proven_or_verified = proven + proven_and_verified + proven_general + verified + verified_exact + verified_exhaustive + verified_exhaustive_plus_proof + verified_reproducible; false_and_corrected = false_corrected + category_error + false_test_design + not_a_real_phenomenon + already_closed + resolved_conceptual_error
